creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
Attached is a patch to fix net-p2p/limewire by updating to newer version and
fixing checksum.  I also updated the pkg-plist since the port's files and
directories changed with the new version.  I also attempted to use correct
constants in the pkg-plist like DOCSDIR and JAVASHAREDIR.

I tested with port test and also on a local Tinderbox and everything builds
fine.  The port also runs fine on my machine.

diff -u /home/chess/ports/limewire/Makefile /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/Makefile
--- /home/chess/ports/limewire/Makefile	2007-11-09 22:33:36.000000000 -0500
+++ /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/Makefile	2007-11-09 23:29:38.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	limewire
-PORTVERSION=	4.12.11
+PORTVERSION=	4.14.10
 PORTREVISION=	1
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net-p2p java
@@ -16,8 +16,6 @@
 MAINTAINER=	armitage@smartwifi.com.ph
 COMMENT=	A Java based Gnutella client
 
-BROKEN=		Checksum mismatch
-
 RUN_DEPENDS=	java:${PORTSDIR}/java/javavmwrapper
 
 USE_ZIP=	yes
diff -u /home/chess/ports/limewire/distinfo /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/distinfo
--- /home/chess/ports/limewire/distinfo	2007-11-09 22:33:36.000000000 -0500
+++ /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/distinfo	2007-11-09 22:34:19.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (LimeWireOther.zip) = f6d3c2e3f8b732fca75208b39b3d5a9f
-SHA256 (LimeWireOther.zip) = b80a06e4b133971e8354fe4dbe3d460b2ed482ede2618c91d42d82fae27aeb16
-SIZE (LimeWireOther.zip) = 8902576
+MD5 (LimeWireOther.zip) = c1dbbf2a449fe45392f300ab4680bd8b
+SHA256 (LimeWireOther.zip) = ac2536c5c1a5d6b2c33ec4f12de5f19aeed14e0bbda179a2129759ab43ebbfa0
+SIZE (LimeWireOther.zip) = 7416146
Common subdirectories: /home/chess/ports/limewire/files and /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/files
diff -u /home/chess/ports/limewire/pkg-plist /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/pkg-plist
--- /home/chess/ports/limewire/pkg-plist	2007-11-09 22:33:36.000000000 -0500
+++ /usr/ports/net-p2p/limewire/pkg-plist	2007-11-10 10:38:36.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,44 +1,43 @@
 bin/limewire
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README.txt
-%%DATADIR%%/LimeWire.ico
-%%DATADIR%%/LimeWire.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/MessagesBundle.properties
-%%DATADIR%%/MessagesBundles.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/ProgressTabs.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/clink.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/commons-httpclient.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/commons-logging.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/commons-net.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/daap.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/data.ser
-%%DATADIR%%/donotremove.htm
-%%DATADIR%%/hashes
-%%DATADIR%%/i18n.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/icu4j.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/id3v2.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/jcraft.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/jdic.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/jl011.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/jmdns.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/log4j.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/log4j.properties
-%%DATADIR%%/looks.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/mp3sp14.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/pmf.ico
-%%DATADIR%%/root/magnet10/badge.img
-%%DATADIR%%/root/magnet10/canHandle.img
-%%DATADIR%%/root/magnet10/limewire.gif
-%%DATADIR%%/root/magnet10/options.js
-%%DATADIR%%/root/magnet10/silentdetect.js
-%%DATADIR%%/spacer.gif
-%%DATADIR%%/themes.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/tritonus.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/update.ver
-%%DATADIR%%/vorbis.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/xerces.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/xml-apis.jar
-%%DATADIR%%/xml.war
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/root/magnet10
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/root
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
+%%DOCSDIR%%/README.txt
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root/magnet10/badge.img
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root/magnet10/canHandle.img
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root/magnet10/limewire.gif
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root/magnet10/options.js
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root/magnet10/silentdetect.js
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/vorbis.jar

+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/themes.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/spacer.gif
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/mp3sp14.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/magnet.protocol
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/looks.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/log4j.properties
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/log4j.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/limewire.js
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/jmdns.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/jl011.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/jdic_stub.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/jdic.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/jcraft.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/id3v2.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/icu4j.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/httpcore.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/httpcore-nio.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/hashes
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/foxtrot.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/data.ser
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/daap.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/commons-pool.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/commons-net.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/commons-logging.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/commons-httpclient.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/clink.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/ProgressTabs.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/MessagesBundles.jar
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/xml.war
+%%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/LimeWire.jar
+@dirrm %%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root/magnet10
+@dirrm %%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire/root
+@dirrm %%JAVASHAREDIR%%/limewire
+@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
